zh.Cork, County Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Barry於1456年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，她的父親John Barry 9th Barrymore21歲，母親Sheelagh Reagh16歲。她和Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1527年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克享年71歲。

zh-hans.Cork, County Cork, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Barry于1456年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，她的父亲John Barry 9th Barrymore21岁，母亲Sheelagh Reagh16岁。她和Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1527年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Barry was born in 1456, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, her father, John Barry 9th Barrymore, was 21 and her mother, Sheelagh Reagh, was 16. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. She died in 1527, in County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Barry est née en 1456, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, John Barry 9th Barrymore, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sheelagh Reagh, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. Elle est décédée en 1527, à County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Barry 1456 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barry 9th Barrymore 21 und ihre Mutter Sheelagh Reagh 16. Sie hatte mit Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1527 im Alter von 71 Jahren in County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Barry è nata il nel 1456 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, John Barry 9th Barrymore, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Sheelagh Reagh, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. Morì nel 1527, nel County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Barryが1456年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父John Barry 9th Barrymoreは21歳，母Sheelagh Reaghは16歳であった。彼女はCormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerryとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1527年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Barry(이)가 1456년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barry 9th Barrymore(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sheelagh Reagh(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Barry nasceu em 1456, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, John Barry 9th Barrymore, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sheelagh Reagh, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. Ela faleceu em 1527, em County Cork, Irlanda, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Barry родилась в 1456 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени John Barry 9th Barrymore было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sheelagh Reagh, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. Она умерла в 1527 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Barry nació en 1456, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, John Barry 9th Barrymore, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Sheelagh Reagh, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry. Murió en 1527, en County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años.
